prompt: Set up Salesforce SSO and SCIM for my Deel OIG POC demo. The Salesforce org is at https://orgfarm-7d8ff5c5c1-dev-ed.develop.lightning.force.com, admin is craig.verzosa+deeloig@okta.com, and the Okta demo name is deel-oig-poc. Walk me through configuring both sides.

assertions.name: covers-all-7-phases
assertions.check: Output covers all phases: Okta credentials, My Domain check, app creation in Okta, SAML config in Salesforce, SCIM provisioning, user assignment, and verification

assertions.name: references-okta-mcp
assertions.check: Output references using demo-okta MCP (get_tenant_management_credentials or similar) to get Okta API access

assertions.name: includes-browse-commands
assertions.check: Output includes $B browse commands or navigation instructions for Salesforce admin UI URLs

assertions.name: correct-saml-entity-id
assertions.check: Output specifies the SAML Entity ID as https://saml.salesforce.com

assertions.name: mentions-federation-identifier
assertions.check: Output mentions FederationIdentifier as a required attribute mapping

assertions.name: includes-summary-block
assertions.check: Output includes a completion summary with SSO and Provisioning status sections

assertions.name: mentions-oig-demo-value
assertions.check: Output includes demo talking points about ILM/OIG use case (deprovisioning, lifecycle management)
